title: Steel Dynamics Set to Join S&P 500; Super Micro Computer to Join S&P MidCap 400
text: NEW YORK , Dec. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P MidCap 400 constituent Steel Dynamics Inc. (NASD:STLD) will replace Abiomed Inc. (NASD:ABMD) in the S&P 500 and Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASD:SMCI) will replace Steel Dynamics in the S&P MidCap 400 effective prior to the opening of trading on Thursday, December 22. S&P 500 constituent Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) is acquiring Abiomed in a deal expected to close soon pending final conditions.

title: Why Fast-paced Mover Steel Dynamics (STLD) Is a Great Choice for Value Investors

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Sees Lower Q4 Profits From Steel Operations
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) expects profitability from its steel operations to be considerably lower in Q4 due to seasonally lower shipments and metal spread compression.

title: Steel Dynamics: The Margin Of Safety Is In The Aluminum Venture
text: Steel Dynamics Inc. is a fundamentally sound cyclical steel company. Any analysis and valuation should be based on its performance over the cycle. The conventional approach is to value the steel operations and then add the value of the Non-Operating Assets amounting to USD 2 billion. This results in USD 109 per share.
